title: quercus stenophylloides
intro: Quercus stenophylloides, also known as the Chinese white oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to China, characterized by its distinctive small leaves and white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Quercus stenophylloides include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Quercus stenophylloides is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and its extracts are also used in capsule or tablet form to harness its medicinal properties.
